features: Organic cotton wicks perfectly sized for a complete burn.
description: Product Description 100 % Pure beeswax tealights handmade in Leicester, UK Every single beeswax tealight is made using 100% pure bees wax sourced from local beekeepers. Enjoy the full ambiance of light from a natural, renewable source! Larger than average tealights Enjoy 5 hours of strong, warm, smoke free light with the BEE Zero Waste beeswax tealights. Handmade in Leicester, UK We are carefully hand pouring every beeswax tealight for the premium relaxation experience. Locally sourced BEESWAX We work together with local beekeepers to source our pure, 100 % beeswax . No added chemicals ,additives or other waxes. 100% plastic free We , at BEE Zero Waste are committed to use no plastic in the production, storage or shipping of any of our products. Join us! BEE Sustainable! BEE Zero Waste! Pure beeswax tealights with cups! Use them as they are and make sure you keep the cups for the refills. 100 % beeswax tealights without cups (refills) Reuse your old BEE Zero Waste tealight cups by using the pure beeswax tealights refills. The same perfect tealight without the need to purchase a new metal cup! HELLO sustainability! Check out our shop for other pure beeswax candles and products. BEE Zero Waste is offering plastic free, natural alternatives to daily use products. See our shop for a great selection of beeswax pillars, tapers, church candles and birthday candles and for beeswax wraps, vegan wax wraps and many more.
